optical_mouse_init.message0: init optical mouse %1 SCLK %2 DIO %3 CS %4 resolution(mm/LSB) %5
optical_mouse_init.tooltip: Initialize optical mouse sensor with SCLK, DIO, CS pins and resolution

optical_mouse_update.tooltip: Read sensor data and update accumulated position

optical_mouse_get_x.tooltip: Get accumulated X position in mm

optical_mouse_get_y.tooltip: Get accumulated Y position in mm

optical_mouse_has_motion.tooltip: Returns true if motion was detected in last update
